exploration_notes: Implemented CDS Tranche product across 3 modules (product, pricer, measure) following existing CDS Index patterns. Created 8 new files: CdsTranche, CdsTrancheTrade, ResolvedCdsTranche, ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade (product); IsdaCdsTranchePricer, IsdaCdsTrancheTradePricer (pricer); CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations, CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction (measure).
